## Meeting Purpose

[Review progress and address challenges across multiple client accounts in GrowthX's strategy sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/iKtGLpsasiTaRKpAS5pxeiSxsz6sjdMg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Several accounts (Outreach, Diligent, Sentinel-1) entering critical phases; need for deep dives and expert interviews emphasized](https://fathom.video/share/iKtGLpsasiTaRKpAS5pxeiSxsz6sjdMg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Urgent need to unblock Argyle content publishing; $60k/month contract pending with no visible progress](https://fathom.video/share/iKtGLpsasiTaRKpAS5pxeiSxsz6sjdMg?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [LLM reporting setup (via Scrunch) identified as a priority for all accounts to demonstrate value and leadership](https://fathom.video/share/iKtGLpsasiTaRKpAS5pxeiSxsz6sjdMg?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [Positive early signals from SEO testing on Airbyte, with significant impression increases noted](https://fathom.video/share/iKtGLpsasiTaRKpAS5pxeiSxsz6sjdMg?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)

## Topics
